Appearances:
Robert Williams, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc.
Arnold Walter Evje appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Rowena Cayanan is present.
Anthony Capozzola representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of September 4, 2007 remains on calendar.
